riddle: I spoke and light filled the sky so bright, made stars, trees, and animals with all my might. Six days of work, then I rested with delight. Who am I?
explanation: God made the whole world out of nothing because He loves us! This shows He is powerful and wants us to enjoy His beautiful creation.

riddle: Rain poured for forty days and nights so dark, but I built a giant boat and saved every animal pair in the ark. Who am I?
explanation: Noah obeyed God even when it looked silly. God kept His promise and saved Noah’s family — He always protects those who trust Him!

riddle: I was a small boy with just a sling and stones, faced a giant and won because God was on my side alone. Who am I?
explanation: David knew God was bigger than any giant. With God’s help, even kids can be brave and win!

riddle: I was thrown in the sea and swallowed by a fish so wide, prayed inside its belly until God let me out alive. Who am I?
explanation: God rescued Jonah when he prayed. He gives second chances and always hears our prayers!

riddle: Lions roared all around me in a scary den, but I prayed and God shut their mouths — I was safe again. Who am I?
explanation: Daniel trusted God more than fear. God protects us when we pray and obey!

riddle: I was a tiny baby in a basket on the river wide, a princess found me and I grew up to lead God’s people with pride. Who am I?
explanation: God saved baby Moses and used him to rescue His people. He has big plans for every kid!

riddle: I had only five loaves and two fish to share, Jesus blessed them and fed thousands — wow, what a miracle there! Who am I?
explanation: Jesus used a little boy’s lunch to feed everyone. When we give what we have, God multiplies it!

riddle: I walked on water when Jesus said 'Come!' to me, but I sank when I looked at the waves instead of Him, you see. Who am I?
explanation: Peter walked on water by looking at Jesus. Keep your eyes on Him and you can do amazing things!

riddle: I helped the hurt man when others walked on by, bandaged him up and showed God’s love from my heart and my supply. Who am I?
explanation: Jesus said love your neighbor like this! Be kind to everyone, even strangers.

riddle: I ran away from home and wasted all my cash, but Dad ran to hug me when I came back — what a splash! Who am I?
explanation: God is like the loving father — He always welcomes us home when we say sorry.

riddle: I was dead for three days in a dark, cold tomb, Jesus called my name and I walked out — no more gloom! Who am I?
explanation: Jesus has power over death! Because He rose, we can live with Him forever.

riddle: I had a colorful coat that made my brothers mad, but God used my story for good — the best ending they ever had. Who am I?
explanation: God turned Joseph’s hard times into something good. He can do the same for you!

riddle: I marched around Jericho with trumpets so loud, the walls fell down when we shouted — what a crowd! Who am I?
explanation: God fights for us when we obey. Trust His plan and watch walls come down!

riddle: I was a queen who risked her life for her people one night, 'If I perish, I perish' — I stood up for what was right. Who am I?
explanation: Esther was brave for God. He places us right where we can help others.

riddle: I stayed with my mother-in-law when times got tough, God blessed us both with a wonderful family — that’s enough! Who am I?
explanation: Ruth chose loyalty and God gave her a happy ending. Kindness always wins!

riddle: I was short and climbed a tree to see Jesus pass by, He called me down and said 'Today salvation came to your house — don’t cry!' Who am I?
explanation: Jesus loves us even when others don’t. He changes hearts!

riddle: I left the 99 sheep safe on the hill so high, searched until I found the lost one — what a happy cry! Who am I?
explanation: Jesus never gives up on us. You are His precious sheep!

riddle: The storm was wild, waves crashed on our boat, Jesus said 'Peace, be still!' and the sea became calm as a float. Who am I?
explanation: Jesus is stronger than any storm. He brings peace to our hearts.

riddle: We were thrown in a furnace hot as can be, an angel walked with us — we came out free! Who are we?
explanation: They refused to bow to idols. God stayed right with them in the fire!

riddle: I was fed by ravens in the desert dry, God sent food from the sky — He always provides, oh my! Who am I?
explanation: God took care of Elijah every day. He provides for you too!
